interface: Atlas Administration API v2 — Events and Alerts resources
auth: Authorization: Bearer <service-account access token> on every request; errors are application/json

query.eventType: repeatable array param — one eventType=<VALUE> pair per requested type, in caller order
query.minDate: ISO 8601 date-time; RFC 3986 reserved characters percent-encode (':' -> %3A)

list_events.pinned_first_request_query_order: eventType (repeated), minDate (only when a checkpoint exists), itemsPerPage=100, includeCount=true, pageNum=1

event_fields.id: unique event id (required) — the deduplication key

pagination.rels: self always; next omitted on the last page; previous omitted on the first
pagination.rule: follow the rel=next href verbatim; absence of next ends the scan
pagination.empty_collection: 200 with results: [] — NOT a 404; 404 with the ApiError envelope means the context (project) does not exist

checkpoint_fixture_rules.advance_rule: only after the complete paginated scan was delivered to the sink in one call; new value = newest delivered created timestamp
checkpoint_fixture_rules.no_events: file untouched (and never created) when nothing was delivered
